_9 charts registered._

## `buy_sell_ledger`

**Selector description (read by the LLM):**

> Per-fund table of buy and sell amounts (₹) from a rebalancing trade plan, sorted by absolute trade size. Use when the user asks 'what trades should I do', 'just show me the trades', the actual buys and sells, or wants the executable steps from a rebalance.

**Builder:** `app.services.visualization_tools.buy_sell_ledger.builder.build_buy_sell_ledger`

**Payload schema:**

```json
{
  "$defs": {
    "BuySellRow": {
      "properties": {
        "name": {
          "title": "Name",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "sub_category": {
          "title": "Sub Category",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "buy_inr": {
          "title": "Buy Inr",
          "type": "number"
        },
        "sell_inr": {
          "title": "Sell Inr",
          "type": "number"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "name",
        "sub_category",
        "buy_inr",
        "sell_inr"
      ],
      "title": "BuySellRow",
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "properties": {
    "schema_version": {
      "const": "v1",
      "default": "v1",
      "title": "Schema Version",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "title": {
      "title": "Title",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "subtitle": {
      "anyOf": [
        {
          "type": "string"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ],
      "default": null,
      "title": "Subtitle"
    },
    "type": {
      "const": "buy_sell_ledger",
      "default": "buy_sell_ledger",
      "title": "Type",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "rows": {
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/BuySellRow"
      },
      "title": "Rows",
      "type": "array"
    }
  },
  "required": [
    "title",
    "rows"
  ],
  "title": "BuySellLedger",
  "type": "object"
}
```

## `category_gap_bar`

**Selector description (read by the LLM):**

> Grouped horizontal bar chart showing Current / Target / Plan allocation (in ₹) per SEBI sub-category. Use when the user asks about gaps, drift, 'how off am I', 'what should I be holding', or generic 'rebalance my portfolio' with no specific framing — this is the default chart for rebalancing questions.

**Builder:** `app.services.visualization_tools.category_gap_bar.builder.build_category_gap_bar`

**Payload schema:**

```json
{
  "$defs": {
    "NamedSeries": {
      "properties": {
        "name": {
          "title": "Name",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "values": {
          "items": {
            "type": "number"
          },
          "title": "Values",
          "type": "array"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "name",
        "values"
      ],
      "title": "NamedSeries",
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "properties": {
    "schema_version": {
      "const": "v1",
      "default": "v1",
      "title": "Schema Version",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "title": {
      "title": "Title",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "subtitle": {
      "anyOf": [
        {
          "type": "string"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ],
      "default": null,
      "title": "Subtitle"
    },
    "type": {
      "const": "category_gap_bar",
      "default": "category_gap_bar",
      "title": "Type",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "categories": {
      "items": {
        "type": "string"
      },
      "title": "Categories",
      "type": "array"
    },
    "series": {
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/NamedSeries"
      },
      "title": "Series",
      "type": "array"
    },
    "caption": {
      "anyOf": [
        {
          "type": "string"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ],
      "default": null,
      "title": "Caption"
    }
  },
  "required": [
    "title",
    "categories",
    "series"
  ],
  "title": "CategoryGapBar",
  "type": "object"
}
```

## `concentration_risk`

**Selector description (read by the LLM):**

> Horizontal bar chart of the user's top-5 holdings by value plus a 'rest' bar, with a severity badge (diversified / watch / concentrated). Use when the user asks about concentration, diversification, biggest holdings, single-fund risk, 'how spread out is my portfolio', or whether they're over-exposed to any one fund.

**Builder:** `app.services.visualization_tools.concentration_risk.builder.build_concentration_risk`

**Payload schema:**

```json
{
  "$defs": {
    "ConcentrationHolding": {
      "properties": {
        "label": {
          "title": "Label",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "value": {
          "title": "Value",
          "type": "number"
        },
        "percentage": {
          "maximum": 100,
          "minimum": 0,
          "title": "Percentage",
          "type": "number"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "label",
        "value",
        "percentage"
      ],
      "title": "ConcentrationHolding",
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "properties": {
    "schema_version": {
      "const": "v1",
      "default": "v1",
      "title": "Schema Version",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "title": {
      "title": "Title",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "subtitle": {
      "anyOf": [
        {
          "type": "string"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ],
      "default": null,
      "title": "Subtitle"
    },
    "type": {
      "const": "concentration_risk",
      "default": "concentration_risk",
      "title": "Type",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "headline": {
      "title": "Headline",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "severity": {
      "enum": [
        "ok",
        "watch",
        "act"
      ],
      "title": "Severity",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "top_n": {
      "title": "Top N",
      "type": "integer"
    },
    "top_holdings": {
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/ConcentrationHolding"
      },
      "title": "Top Holdings",
      "type": "array"
    },
    "rest_percentage": {
      "title": "Rest Percentage",
      "type": "number"
    },
    "rest_count": {
      "title": "Rest Count",
      "type": "integer"
    }
  },
  "required": [
    "title",
    "headline",
    "severity",
    "top_n",
    "top_holdings",
    "rest_percentage",
    "rest_count"
  ],
  "title": "ConcentrationRisk",
  "type": "object"
}
```

## `current_donut`

**Selector description (read by the LLM):**

> Donut chart of the user's current asset allocation, broken down by class (equity, debt, gold, liquid, cash, etc.) with the total portfolio value at the centre. Use whenever the user asks about their current portfolio composition, asset mix, allocation breakdown, holdings split, or wants to see what they own at a glance — including follow-ups like 'show me again' or 'what's my mix'.

**Builder:** `app.services.visualization_tools.current_donut.builder.build_current_donut`

**Payload schema:**

```json
{
  "$defs": {
    "DonutSlice": {
      "properties": {
        "label": {
          "title": "Label",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "value": {
          "title": "Value",
          "type": "number"
        },
        "percentage": {
          "maximum": 100,
          "minimum": 0,
          "title": "Percentage",
          "type": "number"
        },
        "color_hint": {
          "anyOf": [
            {
              "type": "string"
            },
            {
              "type": "null"
            }
          ],
          "default": null,
          "title": "Color Hint"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "label",
        "value",
        "percentage"
      ],
      "title": "DonutSlice",
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "properties": {
    "schema_version": {
      "const": "v1",
      "default": "v1",
      "title": "Schema Version",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "title": {
      "title": "Title",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "subtitle": {
      "anyOf": [
        {
          "type": "string"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ],
      "default": null,
      "title": "Subtitle"
    },
    "type": {
      "const": "current_donut",
      "default": "current_donut",
      "title": "Type",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "total_value": {
      "title": "Total Value",
      "type": "number"
    },
    "slices": {
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/DonutSlice"
      },
      "title": "Slices",
      "type": "array"
    }
  },
  "required": [
    "title",
    "total_value",
    "slices"
  ],
  "title": "CurrentDonut",
  "type": "object"
}
```

## `planned_donut`

**Selector description (read by the LLM):**

> Donut chart of the post-rebalance allocation share by SEBI sub-category. Use when the user asks about the resulting/final portfolio shape, 'what will it look like after I rebalance', or proportions of the planned mix.

**Builder:** `app.services.visualization_tools.planned_donut.builder.build_planned_donut`

**Payload schema:**

```json
{
  "$defs": {
    "PlannedDonutSlice": {
      "properties": {
        "label": {
          "title": "Label",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "value": {
          "title": "Value",
          "type": "number"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "label",
        "value"
      ],
      "title": "PlannedDonutSlice",
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "properties": {
    "schema_version": {
      "const": "v1",
      "default": "v1",
      "title": "Schema Version",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "title": {
      "title": "Title",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "subtitle": {
      "anyOf": [
        {
          "type": "string"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ],
      "default": null,
      "title": "Subtitle"
    },
    "type": {
      "const": "planned_donut",
      "default": "planned_donut",
      "title": "Type",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "slices": {
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/PlannedDonutSlice"
      },
      "title": "Slices",
      "type": "array"
    },
    "caption": {
      "anyOf": [
        {
          "type": "string"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ],
      "default": null,
      "title": "Caption"
    }
  },
  "required": [
    "title",
    "slices"
  ],
  "title": "PlannedDonut",
  "type": "object"
}
```

## `profile_dial`

**Selector description (read by the LLM):**

> Gauge / dial showing the user's risk profile from Conservative to Aggressive (5 bands). Use when the user asks about their risk profile, risk score, 'how aggressive is my profile', risk capacity, or how their profile compares to the spectrum.

**Builder:** `app.services.visualization_tools.profile_dial.builder.build_profile_dial`

**Payload schema:**

```json
{
  "properties": {
    "schema_version": {
      "const": "v1",
      "default": "v1",
      "title": "Schema Version",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "title": {
      "title": "Title",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "subtitle": {
      "anyOf": [
        {
          "type": "string"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ],
      "default": null,
      "title": "Subtitle"
    },
    "type": {
      "const": "profile_dial",
      "default": "profile_dial",
      "title": "Type",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "score": {
      "maximum": 100,
      "minimum": 0,
      "title": "Score",
      "type": "number"
    },
    "band": {
      "enum": [
        "Conservative",
        "Moderate-Conservative",
        "Balanced",
        "Moderate-Aggressive",
        "Aggressive"
      ],
      "title": "Band",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "headline": {
      "title": "Headline",
      "type": "string"
    }
  },
  "required": [
    "title",
    "score",
    "band",
    "headline"
  ],
  "title": "ProfileDial",
  "type": "object"
}
```

## `target_vs_actual`

**Selector description (read by the LLM):**

> Paired bar chart comparing the user's target (ideal/recommended) allocation against their actual current allocation, per asset class, with drift labels. Use when the user asks about whether they're on-track vs their plan, drift from target, rebalancing needs, gap to ideal, or how their actual mix compares to what was recommended.

**Builder:** `app.services.visualization_tools.target_vs_actual.builder.build_target_vs_actual`

**Payload schema:**

```json
{
  "$defs": {
    "TargetVsActualBar": {
      "properties": {
        "asset_class": {
          "title": "Asset Class",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "target_pct": {
          "title": "Target Pct",
          "type": "number"
        },
        "actual_pct": {
          "title": "Actual Pct",
          "type": "number"
        },
        "drift_pct": {
          "title": "Drift Pct",
          "type": "number"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "asset_class",
        "target_pct",
        "actual_pct",
        "drift_pct"
      ],
      "title": "TargetVsActualBar",
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "properties": {
    "schema_version": {
      "const": "v1",
      "default": "v1",
      "title": "Schema Version",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "title": {
      "title": "Title",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "subtitle": {
      "anyOf": [
        {
          "type": "string"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ],
      "default": null,
      "title": "Subtitle"
    },
    "type": {
      "const": "target_vs_actual",
      "default": "target_vs_actual",
      "title": "Type",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "bars": {
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/TargetVsActualBar"
      },
      "title": "Bars",
      "type": "array"
    }
  },
  "required": [
    "title",
    "bars"
  ],
  "title": "TargetVsActual",
  "type": "object"
}
```

## `tax_cost_bar`

**Selector description (read by the LLM):**

> Stacked horizontal bar chart of realised short-term + long-term gains and exit loads per SEBI sub-category, plus headline totals. Use when the user asks about cost, taxes, exit loads, 'is rebalancing worth it', or trade-offs of the rebalance.

**Builder:** `app.services.visualization_tools.tax_cost_bar.builder.build_tax_cost_bar`

**Payload schema:**

```json
{
  "$defs": {
    "TaxCostNamedSeries": {
      "properties": {
        "name": {
          "title": "Name",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "values": {
          "items": {
            "type": "number"
          },
          "title": "Values",
          "type": "array"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "name",
        "values"
      ],
      "title": "TaxCostNamedSeries",
      "type": "object"
    },
    "TaxCostTotals": {
      "properties": {
        "tax_estimate_inr": {
          "title": "Tax Estimate Inr",
          "type": "number"
        },
        "exit_load_inr": {
          "title": "Exit Load Inr",
          "type": "number"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "tax_estimate_inr",
        "exit_load_inr"
      ],
      "title": "TaxCostTotals",
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "properties": {
    "schema_version": {
      "const": "v1",
      "default": "v1",
      "title": "Schema Version",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "title": {
      "title": "Title",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "subtitle": {
      "anyOf": [
        {
          "type": "string"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ],
      "default": null,
      "title": "Subtitle"
    },
    "type": {
      "const": "tax_cost_bar",
      "default": "tax_cost_bar",
      "title": "Type",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "categories": {
      "items": {
        "type": "string"
      },
      "title": "Categories",
      "type": "array"
    },
    "series": {
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/TaxCostNamedSeries"
      },
      "title": "Series",
      "type": "array"
    },
    "totals": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/TaxCostTotals"
    },
    "caption": {
      "anyOf": [
        {
          "type": "string"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ],
      "default": null,
      "title": "Caption"
    }
  },
  "required": [
    "title",
    "categories",
    "series",
    "totals"
  ],
  "title": "TaxCostBar",
  "type": "object"
}
```

## `top_bottom_funds`

**Selector description (read by the LLM):**

> Bar chart of the top-3 and bottom-3 funds in the user's portfolio by 1-year return, with a portfolio-average reference line. Use when the user asks about which funds are performing well or poorly, 'best and worst', 'which funds are dragging', or fund-level performance comparison.

**Builder:** `app.services.visualization_tools.top_bottom_funds.builder.build_top_bottom_funds`

**Payload schema:**

```json
{
  "$defs": {
    "FundReturnRow": {
      "properties": {
        "name": {
          "title": "Name",
          "type": "string"
        },
        "return_pct": {
          "title": "Return Pct",
          "type": "number"
        },
        "current_value": {
          "title": "Current Value",
          "type": "number"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "name",
        "return_pct",
        "current_value"
      ],
      "title": "FundReturnRow",
      "type": "object"
    }
  },
  "properties": {
    "schema_version": {
      "const": "v1",
      "default": "v1",
      "title": "Schema Version",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "title": {
      "title": "Title",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "subtitle": {
      "anyOf": [
        {
          "type": "string"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ],
      "default": null,
      "title": "Subtitle"
    },
    "type": {
      "const": "top_bottom_funds",
      "default": "top_bottom_funds",
      "title": "Type",
      "type": "string"
    },
    "top": {
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/FundReturnRow"
      },
      "title": "Top",
      "type": "array"
    },
    "bottom": {
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/FundReturnRow"
      },
      "title": "Bottom",
      "type": "array"
    },
    "portfolio_average_pct": {
      "title": "Portfolio Average Pct",
      "type": "number"
    }
  },
  "required": [
    "title",
    "top",
    "bottom",
    "portfolio_average_pct"
  ],
  "title": "TopBottomFunds",
  "type": "object"
}
```
